data.title: WIRobotics draws global attention at CES 2026 with diverse robotics showcased, co-led by Younbaek Lee and Yongjae Kim.
data.description: WIRobotics, a leading global robotics firm headed by Co-CEOs Younbaek Lee and Yongjae Kim, has revealed it is attracting significant interest from international media and industry partners at the CES 2026 primary showcase in Las Vegas. The event, which commenced on January 9, 2026, is witnessing a surge in attention towards the company's innovative offerings.

data.title: Marriott Bonvoy partners with ICC, providing exclusive access to global cricket events. Official Accommodation Partner in multi-year deal.
data.description: Marriott Bonvoy has been chosen as the Official Accommodation Partner in a long-term strategic collaboration. The agreement between Marriott Bonvoy and the International Cricket Council (ICC) was made official in Bethesda, Md., on January 9, 2026. This partnership will involve Marriott International's top-notch services being provided to support ICC events and tournaments globally.

data.title: Zebra Technologies introduces AI-powered solutions for retail ops at NRF 2026. Booth #3303 at Jacob K. Javits Center, Jan 11-13 in NYC.
data.description: Zebra Technologies Corporation, a prominent player in streamlining workflows through digitization, is set to present its newest AI-powered products and services at NRF 2026: Retail’s Big Show. The company will exhibit its solutions at Booth #3303 during the event scheduled from Jan. 11-13, 2026, at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in New York City. With retail businesses striving to keep up in a demanding environment, Zebra's offerings aim to assist in meeting the escalating consumer demands.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts names OSRAM Sylvania Inc. Global 2025 Vendor Partner of the Year in Raleigh.
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - Advance Auto Parts has announced OSRAM Sylvania Inc. as the Global 2025 Vendor Partner of the Year.

data.title: REAL Shows Network (RSN) introduces The Houston Collective, a new TV series in Houston, TX, highlighting real estate and lifestyle.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, the REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the addition of The Houston Collective, a new program based in Houston, TX, to its lineup. The series will be hosted by Beth and other local real estate leaders in the area. The RSN is a national TV platform that focuses on showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives. This new show signifies the network's commitment to highlighting the real estate market in Houston, a key city in the industry.

data.title: Pinnacle Financial and Morris State Bancshares rebrand as Vallant Financial; partnership reflects commitment to community since 1934.
data.description: In Elberton, Georgia and Dublin, Georgia, a strategic partnership was announced on Jan. 7, 2026, by Pinnacle Financial Corporation, the parent company of Pinnacle Bank, and Morris State Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Morris Bank (OTCQX: MBLU). This partnership was established in November under a new brand name. The unified holding company, Vallant Financial, Inc., embodies the forward-thinking approach and strong community commitment that both companies have upheld since 1934.

data.title: Bright Minds Biosciences closed US$175M public offering of 1,945,000 common shares at US$90.00 per share. Underwriters have option for additional shares.
data.description: On January 9th, 2026, Bright Minds Biosciences Inc. (CSE: DRUG) (NASDAQ: DRUG) successfully closed a public offering they recently announced. The offering involved 1,945,000 common shares at a price of US$90.00 per share, resulting in gross proceeds of US$175,050,000. Additionally, the underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to buy up to 291,750 additional common shares at the same price, minus discounts and commissions. All the securities in this offering were provided by Bright Minds.

data.title: Informatica named leader in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data & Analytics Governance Platforms, based on Vision & Execution.
data.description: Informatica from Salesforce, a company specializing in enterprise AI-powered cloud data management, was recently recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data and Analytics Governance Platforms. Their achievement in this evaluation was determined by their strong performance in terms of overall Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. To be considered for evaluation by Gartner, companies offering Data & Analytics Governance platforms must meet specified criteria regarding their services and capabilities.

data.title: India Methanol Market Report includes PESTEL analysis, producers, exports/imports, wholesalers, consumers; 2025 outlook - ResearchAndMarkets.
data.description: A recent report titled "Methanol Market in India: Business Report 2025" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the analysis of the methanol market within India. It includes a brief country profile containing general information and key economic indicators while detailing the business environment in India. The report assesses the methanol market using various parameters such as domestic production and consumption, with an estimation of future market development. Additionally, it covers trade analysis data.

data.title: Ethereum co-founder reaffirms backing Roman Storm for privacy reasons, despite him found guilty of operating unlicensed business, might face retrial on two counts.
data.description: In August, the developer of Tornado Cash was convicted of conducting an unauthorized transmission business. Despite this, there is a possibility of facing a retrial for two charges that the jury could not reach a verdict on.
